Name: /IOTCONNECT Core C Library
Description: The core C library forming the foundation for /IOTCONNECT in C.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Python Library
Description: Core Python library for /IOTCONNECT integrations.

Name: /IOTCONNECT C SDK for Azure RTOS
Boards: B-U585I-IOT02A, B-L475E-IOT01A2, MIMXRT1060-EVKB, EV36W50A, CK-RK65N, ATSAME54-XPRO, AES-MC-SBC-IMXRT1176-G
Description: C SDK and samples for Azure RTOS devices across ST, NXP, Microchip and Renesas eval boards.

Name: /IOTCONNECT DA16K SDK
Description: SDK for Renesas DA16200/DA16600 Wi-Fi modules.

Name: /IOTCONNECT ModusToolbox SDK
Description: ModusToolbox SDK for /IOTCONNECT on Infineon PSoC devices.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Python Lite SDK
Description: Full-featured Python SDK for /IOTCONNECT on embedded Linux.

Name: Agrisense with AVR_IOT
Description: Hackster guide for getting started with the AVR IoT Cellular Mini. It walks through setting up the board, activating the SIM, collecting sensor data and connecting to IOTCONNECT via the provided C SDK. The demo monitors temperature, light and button presses and sends telemetry to the cloud.

Name: Astra Asset Tracker
Description: Guide for onboarding LoRaWAN devices to IOTCONNECT. It walks through creating templates and configuring device attributes such as temperature, pressure, humidity and accelerometer for ST ASTRA1B and NUCLEO-WL55JC boards, creating LoRaWAN devices in the portal and sending telemetry and commands.

Name: AVR-IOT mini Cellular
Description: IOTCONNECT C SDK example for the AVR IoT Cellular Mini board. The application records button presses and collects on‑board sensor readings (temperature and RGB light) and sends telemetry to IOTCONNECT. It also supports simple commands to control LEDs and guides you through provisioning the board and activating the cellular modem.

Name: Drone
Description: Drone demo for /IOTCONNECT.

Name: Edge AI Inference Pipeline (Jetson Orin NX)
Description: This demo performs compute-intensive AI inference on the edge and sends the processed results to the cloud. IoTConnect then visualizes the inference output and system performance in real time.

Name: Edge AI Inference Pipeline (Jetson Orin NX)
Description: This demo performs compute-intensive AI inference on the edge and sends the processed results to the cloud. IoTConnect then visualizes the inference output and system performance in real time.

Name: Edge AI Object Detection - Fruit
Description: This demo features the STM32MP135, a cost-effective MPU running ST’s OpenSTLinux and X-Linux-AI packages. The device performs real-time object detection, locally identifying up to three objects and sending results to the cloud. The AI model can be toggled independently of the IOTCONNECT connection for uninterrupted functionality.

Name: Telehealth Mobile Gateway
Description: Telehealth demo using the IOTCONNECT mobile gateway application. Wearable or remote health sensors connect via Bluetooth to the mobile app, which forwards vital signs and events to IOTCONNECT for monitoring and visualisation.

Name: Edge People Detection & Tracking with Ryzen 7 AI
Description: This platform runs AI inference using Ryzen’s CPU/GPU/NPU architecture to perform advanced vision processing at the edge. Inference output and system metrics are delivered to IoTConnect for cloud-level insight and device management.

Name: EV Charging - Commercial
Description: Collaborative demo with Witekio discussing the challenges and considerations in EV charging software. It highlights the need for load balancing, secure user authentication, remote monitoring and integration with backend management platforms for smart EV chargers.

Name: EV Charging - Residential
Description: Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment (EVSE) demo that connects a charging station to IOTCONNECT. It showcases how to monitor charging sessions, report energy consumption and control the charger via cloud commands, providing a starting point for building smart EV charging solutions.

Name: FPGA-Driven Industrial Gesture Recognition
Description: Uses the ZU1CG MPSoC’s FPGA fabric to perform vision-based industrial gesture recognition with custom edge-optimized logic. A trained American Sign Language (ASL) classification model using Vitis AI. Detected gestures drive industrial control actions while reporting telemetry to IOTCONNECT.

Name: GGL Basic - Health, Serial
Description: Python SDK for building AWS Greengrass components that integrate with IOTCONNECT. The SDK provides examples showing how to send telemetry, receive commands and perform OTA updates from IOTCONNECT.

Name: GGL Basic - Health, Serial
Description: Python SDK for building AWS Greengrass components that integrate with IOTCONNECT. The SDK provides examples showing how to send telemetry, receive commands and perform OTA updates from IOTCONNECT.

Name: GGL Basic - Health, Serial
Description: Python SDK for building AWS Greengrass components that integrate with IOTCONNECT. The SDK provides examples showing how to send telemetry, receive commands and perform OTA updates from IOTCONNECT.

Name: GGL Basic - Health, Serial
Description: Python SDK for building AWS Greengrass components that integrate with IOTCONNECT. The SDK provides examples showing how to send telemetry, receive commands and perform OTA updates from IOTCONNECT.

Name: GGL Basic - Health, Serial
Description: Python SDK for building AWS Greengrass components that integrate with IOTCONNECT. The SDK provides examples showing how to send telemetry, receive commands and perform OTA updates from IOTCONNECT.

Name: GGL Components - AI Vision Demo / PROTEUS BLE / SensorTileBox Pro BLE
Description: Collection of AWS Greengrass components built with the IOTCONNECT Python SDK. Includes an AI vision demo that detects objects using a connected camera and BLE demos that gather battery, accelerometer, gyroscope and temperature data from sensors and send it to IOTCONNECT.

Name: GGL Components - AI Vision Demo / PROTEUS BLE / SensorTileBox Pro BLE
Description: Collection of AWS Greengrass components built with the IOTCONNECT Python SDK. Includes an AI vision demo that detects objects using a connected camera and BLE demos that gather battery, accelerometer, gyroscope and temperature data from sensors and send it to IOTCONNECT.

Name: GGL Components - AI Vision Demo / PROTEUS BLE / SensorTileBox Pro BLE
Description: Collection of AWS Greengrass components built with the IOTCONNECT Python SDK. Includes an AI vision demo that detects objects using a connected camera and BLE demos that gather battery, accelerometer, gyroscope and temperature data from sensors and send it to IOTCONNECT.

Name: Hand-Gesture Robotics Control
Description: Controlling a wheeled vehicle in ROS2.  CV Controller using Edge Impulse custom model to detect Face and Hands (open and close).  Demonstration running at 45FPS

Name: Image Classification and Remote Training
Description: Image classification demo for the STM32MP2 platform. The project converts a TensorFlow model to TFLite, deploys it via IOTCONNECT OTA and performs inference on images from a USB or MIPI camera. It includes instructions for flashing the device, setting up the camera and running the application using a MobileNet V2 model.

Name: ISP
Description: Demonstration of remote ISP tuning using IOTCONNECT. On STM32MP257F Discovery Kit it allows users to stream live video, adjust image signal processor parameters like exposure and gain, and view real‑time telemetry from the image sensor through a cloud dashboard.

Name: LoRaWAN Sensor Monitoring
Description: Guide for onboarding LoRaWAN devices to IOTCONNECT. It walks through creating templates and configuring device attributes such as temperature, pressure, humidity and accelerometer for ST ASTRA1B and NUCLEO-WL55JC boards, creating LoRaWAN devices in the portal and sending telemetry and commands.

Name: Machine Monitoring
Description: Example project for the Renesas CK‑RA6M5 v2 Cloud Kit. It uses an IOTCONNECT AT‑command‑enabled Wi‑Fi module (DA16600) to connect the board to IOTCONNECT. The demo sends telemetry and supports commands such as toggling the red LED and setting the LED blink frequency on the board.

Name: Managing Edge AI:  RZBoard V2L
Description: Quickstart guide for connecting the Renesas RZBoard V2L to IOTCONNECT and running the on‑board AI camera demo. The document covers flashing the SD card image, configuring the board and IOTCONNECT account, and using an attached USB camera for object recognition with real‑time telemetry streamed to IOTCONNECT.

Name: Multi Stream Video and AI
Description: The Vision AI Kit IQ9 Demonstrates 9 conncurent video feeds, decoded with various AI models running in real time.

Name: Nano Edge AI Anomaly Detection
Description: NEAI anomaly detection demo using the STM32MP157F Discovery Kit and the STEVAL‑PROTEUS1 sensor module. The application runs AI models on the edge to detect unusual patterns and reports anomalies to IOTCONNECT for real‑time monitoring.

Name: Protected Hybrid Solar Inverter
Description: Quick‑start application for the STM32H573I‑DK Discovery Kit using the IOTCONNECT Azure RTOS SDK. The guide demonstrates how to program the board, provision secure credentials using STM32 Trust TEE and connect the device to IOTCONNECT. It includes step‑by‑step instructions for flashing the demo firmware and configuring IOTCONNECT templates and devices.

Name: PSOC6 AI-Kit Fall Detect
Description: This fall detection demo integrates Infineon's ModusToolbox™ machine‑learning flow with Avnet's IOTCONNECT platform. The application uses data from the on‑board inertial measurement unit (IMU) to recognise when a person has fallen and reports these events to IOTCONNECT.

Name: PSOC6 AI-Kit Gesture Detect
Description: This project demonstrates ModusToolbox™ machine learning with Imagimob ready models, combining audio and radar sensor data. It can detect a variety of audio events such as sirens, baby cry, alarms, coughs and snoring, and also recognises hand gestures using the board's radar sensor.

Name: PSOC6 AI-Kit Ready Models
Description: This project demonstrates ModusToolbox™ machine learning with Imagimob ready models, combining audio and radar sensor data. It can detect a variety of audio events such as sirens, baby cry, alarms, coughs and snoring, and also recognises hand gestures using the board's radar sensor.

Name: PSOC6 AI-Kit Siren Detection
Description: This project demonstrates ModusToolbox™ machine learning with Imagimob ready models, combining audio and radar sensor data. It can detect a variety of audio events such as sirens, baby cry, alarms, coughs and snoring, and also recognises hand gestures using the board's radar sensor.

Name: PSOC6 Xensiv CO2 Monitor
Description: Quickstart for Infineon’s XENSIV PAS CO2 kit. The guide shows how to connect the sensor board to IOTCONNECT using the Optiga Trust M secure element for hardware security. It walks through flashing the PSoC6 Wi‑Fi/Bluetooth controller, provisioning the secure element and registering the device on IOTCONNECT, then demonstrates streaming CO₂ measurements to an IOTCONNECT dashboard.

Name: QCS6490-Vision-AI-Demo
Description: On-device hand-gesture recognition using Qualcomm’s advanced CPU/GPU/NPU AI engine. The system translates left- and right-hand movements into real-time robotic control signals while streaming the results to IoTConnect.

Name: RA Cloud Ready Platforms
Description: Example project for the Renesas EK‑RA8M1 evaluation kit that uses a DA16600 Wi‑Fi/BLE module to connect to IOTCONNECT. The application streams telemetry and allows controlling the on‑board LEDs via IOTCONNECT commands. It includes guidance for configuring IOTCONNECT credentials and automatically provisioning the Wi‑Fi module.

Name: RASyn Puck
Description: The RASynPuck demo was created to showcase the RASynBoard and Avnet's Cloud Solution IOTCONNECT.

Name: SensorTile.Box Pro with Bridge Mobile App
Description: Mobile phone/tablet application that acts as a Bluetooth gateway for IOTCONNECT. The app connects to edge devices such as the ST SensorTile.box Pro, captures telemetry via BLE and forwards it to IOTCONNECT. It guides users through account setup, device onboarding and viewing live dashboards on the platform.

Name: Sidewalk
Description: This demo shows how STMicroelectronics' STM32WBA (BLE) and STM32WL (LoRa) work together as a unified device for Amazon Sidewalk. IOTCONNECT simplifies onboarding by integrating these devices as a single wireless type, streamlining deployments compared to the traditional AWS console process.

Name: Smart Asset Monitoring
Description: This demo showcases a smart factory monitoring system using embedded devices to simulate real industrial equipment such as pumps, compressors, cranes, and inspection systems. Telemetry is securely transmitted to the cloud, where real-time KPIs—like utilization, duty cycles, rejection rates, and anomaly detection—are calculated using DURATION-based logic. The system demonstrates how manufacturers can gain operational insights, trigger alerts, and improve uptime without requiring physical assets on-site.

Name: Smart Tractor
Description: Connected Tractor demostration enabling the features of the tractor to be remotely monitored and controlled.  Demo is highlighting SimpleFlex, the intelligent combination of a standard Computer-On-Modules with a standard carrier board. It combines the advantages of Standard SBC and Custom SBC by choosing the COM from a huge portfolio of CPU and memory configurations.  The app will run on multiple SMARC devices from Tria.

Name: SPARK Smart Parking Demo
Description: SPARK is a smart parking and EV charging demo running on the Renesas RZBoard V2L. It uses a convolutional neural network to detect vehicle occupancy in real‑time, scales to hundreds of parking spots and can stream analytics data to IOTCONNECT or display it locally via HDMI.

Name: STM32N6 Edge AI Demos
Description: Edge AI demo for the STM32N6 platform demonstrating object detection using an embedded vision model. The application streams detection results to IOTCONNECT where bounding boxes and labels can be visualised.

Name: STM32N6 Edge AI Object Detection
Description: This demo showcases a new STMicroelectronics microcontroller with an integrated NPU for edge AI, using the ST Cube AI library for real-time person detection. The system assigns a unique ID to the first person in the frame and dynamically tracks them using a motorized camera base, keeping the individual centered in the frame.

Name: STSAFE Secure Authentication
Description: Hardware-anchored device authentication using the STSAFE-A secure element on the STM32U5. The board provisions cryptographic credentials and connects to /IOTCONNECT with a verified identity, demonstrating telemetry and command flows built on a hardware root of trust.

Name: Telehealth
Description: Mobile phone/tablet application that acts as a Bluetooth gateway for IOTCONNECT. The app connects to edge devices such as the ST SensorTile.box Pro, captures telemetry via BLE and forwards it to IOTCONNECT. It guides users through account setup, device onboarding and viewing live dashboards on the platform.

Name: Urban Sound Event Classifier
Description: Smart‑city noise detection demo for the STM32U5 MCU. The system uses machine‑learning to classify sounds such as alarms, dog barks, speech and car horns and runs inference locally on the microcontroller. Recognised events and confidence scores are sent to IOTCONNECT for visualisation.

Name: Vision AI Demonstrator
Description: This demo highlights the STM32MP257 evaluation kit's real-time image classification capabilities using an S3 bucket as the image source. Leveraging its Neural-ART Accelerator, the device processes images locally, sending results with labels and confidence scores to the cloud for centralized analysis

Name: WFI-32 Sensor Clicks
Description: This example connects the WFI32-IoT Development Board to Avnet's IOTCONNECT platform built on Microsoft Azure and uses Azure RTOS to simplify cloud firmware development.  The WFI32 board features integrated sensors and supports mikroBUS™ expansion for additional click‑board sensors.

Name: Worker Safety Compliance
Description: Quickstart demo for the NXP FRDM i.MX 93 platform using the IOTCONNECT Python Lite SDK. The board features tri‑radio connectivity (Wi‑Fi 6, Bluetooth 5.4 and 802.15.4), enabling rapid development of IoT applications. This project shows how to push telemetry to IOTCONNECT and receive commands from the cloud.

Name: Vision AI Robotic Arm
Description: Vision-guided pick-and-place demo pairing the TRIA Vision AI Kit (QCS6490) with a Hiwonder xArm robotic arm. On-device object detection on the Qualcomm NPU drives the arm in real time while results and control telemetry stream to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: PSOC Edge AI Vision WebRTC
Description: DEEPCRAFT AI Vision demo on the Infineon PSOC Edge E84 that streams live camera and inference results over WebRTC. Built with ModusToolbox and integrated with /IOTCONNECT for cloud monitoring and control.

Name: PSOC Edge Motion Sensing
Description: DEEPCRAFT motion and IMU demo for the Infineon PSOC Edge E84 that classifies movement patterns locally and reports events to /IOTCONNECT. A ModusToolbox starting point for gesture and activity-aware applications.

Name: PSOC Edge DEEPCRAFT Ready Models
Description: Runs Infineon DEEPCRAFT Ready Models on the PSOC Edge E84 to detect audio and sensor events out of the box. Integrated with /IOTCONNECT for live event visualization and device management.

Name: PSOC Edge Secure PSA with TF-M
Description: Secure PSOC Edge E84 demo running DEEPCRAFT ready models inside a PSA-certified Trusted Firmware-M (TF-M) environment. Shows how to combine hardware-backed security with on-device AI while connected to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: PSOC Edge Voice Assistant
Description: DEEPCRAFT voice assistant demo on the Infineon PSOC Edge E84 performing local wake-word and command recognition. Recognized events are reported to /IOTCONNECT for cloud-side automation.

Name: PSOC Edge Baby Monitor
Description: DEEPCRAFT baby monitor demo on the PSOC Edge E84 that detects infant cries and other sounds locally and alerts /IOTCONNECT. A smart-home audio AI reference built with ModusToolbox.

Name: PSOC AI-Kit Human Activity Detection
Description: Imagimob human activity detection on the PSOC 6 AI Kit, classifying movements from the on-board IMU. Detected activities are streamed to /IOTCONNECT using the ModusToolbox machine-learning flow.

Name: PSOC AI-Kit Baby Monitor
Description: Imagimob sound-classification baby monitor on the PSOC 6 AI Kit that recognizes infant cries from the on-board microphone. Alerts and audio-event telemetry are sent to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: ModusToolbox Basic Example
Description: Minimal ModusToolbox starter that connects an Infineon PSOC 6 Wi-Fi board to /IOTCONNECT. A clean baseline for sending telemetry and handling cloud commands before adding application logic.

Name: Home Assistant Bridge
Description: Bridges a Home Assistant instance to /IOTCONNECT over MQTT, exposing smart-home entities as cloud telemetry and accepting commands back. Lets existing Home Assistant deployments gain /IOTCONNECT dashboards and rules.

Name: IoTConnect Relay Service
Description: Lightweight relay that plugs existing applications into /IOTCONNECT without rewriting them. Forwards local data to the cloud and routes commands back, simplifying brownfield integrations.

Name: MCX Zephyr Demos
Description: Zephyr RTOS example applications connecting the NXP FRDM-MCXN947 to /IOTCONNECT. Demonstrates telemetry, commands and a Zephyr-based development workflow for NXP MCX MCUs.

Name: MaaXBoard OSM93 Demos
Description: Demo applications for the TRIA MaaXBoard OSM93 connecting the i.MX 93 SBC to /IOTCONNECT. Showcases edge processing and cloud telemetry on a compact embedded Linux platform.

Name: Arduino Uno Q App Lab
Description: Hands-on application lab for connecting the Arduino Uno Q to /IOTCONNECT. Guides developers through building cloud-connected sketches and Python apps with telemetry and command handling.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Greengrass C Component SDK
Description: C SDK for building AWS IoT Greengrass components that integrate with /IOTCONNECT. Provides native-code building blocks for telemetry, command handling and edge processing on Greengrass gateways.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Python Greengrass Components
Description: Ready-to-deploy AWS IoT Greengrass components written in Python for /IOTCONNECT. Reusable building blocks that send telemetry, receive commands and extend Greengrass edge deployments.

Name: X-CUBE ST67 Wi-Fi SDK
Description: /IOTCONNECT SDK for the STMicroelectronics ST67 Wi-Fi module, packaged as an STM32Cube expansion. Connects STM32 designs to the cloud over Wi-Fi with telemetry and command support.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Node.js SDK
Description: Node.js SDK for connecting JavaScript and TypeScript applications to /IOTCONNECT. Handles device authentication, telemetry publishing and command callbacks for server and gateway apps.

Name: /IOTCONNECT .NET SDK
Description: .NET SDK for integrating C# applications and services with /IOTCONNECT. Provides device connectivity, telemetry and command handling for Windows and cross-platform .NET deployments.

Name: /IOTCONNECT iOS Swift SDK
Description: Swift SDK for connecting native iOS applications to /IOTCONNECT. Enables mobile apps to act as device clients or gateways, publishing telemetry and responding to cloud commands.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Android SDK
Description: Android SDK for connecting Java and Kotlin apps to /IOTCONNECT. Lets mobile devices serve as edge clients or BLE gateways, streaming telemetry and handling commands.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Generic C SDK
Description: Portable generic C SDK for /IOTCONNECT designed to run across a wide range of platforms and RTOSes. A flexible foundation for bringing custom C-based devices online with telemetry, commands and OTA.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Yocto C SDK
Description: C SDK packaged for Yocto-based embedded Linux builds connecting to /IOTCONNECT. Integrates into custom Linux images to provide native telemetry and command handling on MPU platforms.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Yocto Python SDK
Description: Python SDK packaged for Yocto-based embedded Linux distributions connecting to /IOTCONNECT. Simplifies adding cloud telemetry and command support to custom Linux images on MPU platforms.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Python SDK
Description: Full-featured Python SDK for /IOTCONNECT — the most common starting point for desktop, server and embedded Linux device-to-cloud integrations.

Name: /IOTCONNECT Python REST API
Description: Python client for the /IOTCONNECT REST API — manage devices, templates and telemetry programmatically.

Name: /IOTCONNECT nRF Connect SDK
Description: /IOTCONNECT SDK for Nordic nRF9160 and nRF52 devices — connect the Thingy:91 and nRF52840 DK over cellular or BLE to the cloud.

Name: PolarFire SoC DK — Complex Neural Network Accelerator
Description: Runs a larger model with batched execution on the PolarFire SoC to maximize hardware neural-network acceleration gains while reporting results to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: PolarFire SoC DK — Simple Neural Network Accelerator
Description: Demonstrates a compact fixed-point neural-network accelerator on the PolarFire SoC using the same /IOTCONNECT command interface as the template-correlation classifier.

Name: PolarFire SoC DK — Template Correlation Classifier
Description: Validates end-to-end cloud command/control and telemetry on the PolarFire SoC with a deterministic template-correlation classifier.

Name: PolarFire Video Kit — Template Correlation Classifier
Description: Validates end-to-end cloud command/control and telemetry on the PolarFire SoC Video Kit with a deterministic template-correlation classifier.

Name: PolarFire Video Kit — Simple Neural Network Accelerator
Description: Demonstrates a compact fixed-point neural-network accelerator on the PolarFire SoC Video Kit using the same /IOTCONNECT command interface as the template-correlation classifier.

Name: PolarFire Video Kit — Complex Neural Network Accelerator
Description: Runs a larger model with batched execution on the PolarFire SoC Video Kit to maximize hardware neural-network acceleration gains.

Name: SAMA7D65 Curiosity — Keyword Spotting
Description: Turns the SAMA7D65-Curiosity Kit into a USB-microphone keyword spotter that publishes inference results to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: SAMA7D65 Curiosity — Voice Blackjack (KWS Game)
Description: Plays a voice-controlled blackjack game on the SAMA7D65-Curiosity Kit driven by on-device keyword spotting.

Name: SAMA7D65 Curiosity — KWS Training Studio
Description: Provides a complete on-board retraining pipeline for customizing the SAMA7D65 keyword-spotting model.

Name: SAMA7D65 Curiosity — PAC1934 Power Monitoring
Description: Reads voltage, current, and power from the on-board PAC1934 power-monitor IC and publishes the measurements to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: Jetson Orin — Amazon KVS PutMedia
Description: Streams live video from the Jetson Orin to AWS Kinesis Video Streams using the KVS PutMedia API.

Name: i.MX93 — Driver Monitoring (DMS) Vision AI
Description: Runs the eIQ Vision AI driver-monitoring system on the FRDM i.MX 93 to detect driver attention and alertness.

Name: i.MX93 — Driver Monitoring with Face Recognition
Description: Extends the i.MX 93 driver-monitoring vision demo with face recognition to identify the driver alongside attention tracking.

Name: i.MX93 — Media Capture & File Upload
Description: Captures media on the FRDM-IMX93 and uploads the resulting files to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: i.MX93 — Amazon KVS PutMedia
Description: Streams live video from the FRDM-IMX93 to AWS Kinesis Video Streams using the KVS PutMedia API.

Name: i.MX93 — Amazon KVS WebRTC
Description: Streams live video from the FRDM-IMX93 over AWS Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC for low-latency viewing.

Name: RZ/V2H EVK — AI Inference Vision
Description: Runs a full Python computer-vision AI inference pipeline on the Renesas RZ/V2H EVK and reports results to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: RZ/V2H EVK — System Monitor
Description: Streams real-time system metrics from the Renesas RZ/V2H EVK to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: STM32MP135F-DK — X-LINUX-AI Vision
Description: Runs the X-LINUX-AI object-detection vision pipeline on the STM32MP135F-DK and publishes detections to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: STM32MP135F-DK — Amazon KVS PutMedia
Description: Streams live video from the STM32MP135F-DK to AWS Kinesis Video Streams using the KVS PutMedia API.

Name: STM32MP135F-DK — Amazon KVS WebRTC
Description: Streams live video from the STM32MP135F-DK over AWS Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC for low-latency viewing.

Name: STM32MP135F-DK — MKBOXPRO BLE Sensors
Description: Streams telemetry from the STEVAL-MKBOXPRO BLE sensor pack to /IOTCONNECT via the STM32MP135F-DK.

Name: STM32MP135F-DK — PROTEUS Sensors
Description: Streams telemetry from the standard STEVAL-PROTEUS sensor pack to /IOTCONNECT via the STM32MP135F-DK.

Name: STM32MP157F-DK2 — X-LINUX-AI Vision
Description: Runs the X-LINUX-AI object-detection vision pipeline on the STM32MP157F-DK2 and publishes detections to /IOTCONNECT.

Name: STM32MP157F-DK2 — Amazon KVS PutMedia
Description: Streams live video from the STM32MP157F-DK2 to AWS Kinesis Video Streams using the KVS PutMedia API.

Name: STM32MP157F-DK2 — Amazon KVS WebRTC
Description: Streams live video from the STM32MP157F-DK2 over AWS Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC for low-latency viewing.

Name: STM32MP157F-DK2 — MKBOXPRO BLE Sensors
Description: Streams telemetry from the STEVAL-MKBOXPRO BLE sensor pack to /IOTCONNECT via the STM32MP157F-DK2.

Name: STM32MP157F-DK2 — PROTEUS Sensors
Description: Streams telemetry from the standard STEVAL-PROTEUS sensor pack to /IOTCONNECT via the STM32MP157F-DK2.

Description: Streams live video from the STM32MP257F-DK to AWS Kinesis Video Streams using the KVS PutMedia API.

Description: Streams live video from the STM32MP257F-DK over AWS Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC for low-latency viewing.

Description: Streams telemetry from the STEVAL-MKBOXPRO BLE sensor pack to /IOTCONNECT via the STM32MP257F-DK.

Description: Streams telemetry from the standard STEVAL-PROTEUS sensor pack to /IOTCONNECT via the STM32MP257F-DK.

Description: Streams live video from the STM32MP257F-EV1 to AWS Kinesis Video Streams using the KVS PutMedia API.

Description: Streams live video from the STM32MP257F-EV1 over AWS Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC for low-latency viewing.

Description: Runs the eIQ Vision AI driver-monitoring system on the Tria MaaXBoard OSM93 to detect driver attention and alertness.

Description: Streams live video from the Tria Vision AI-Kit 6490 to AWS Kinesis Video Streams using the KVS PutMedia API.

Description: Streams live video from the Tria Vision AI-Kit 6490 over AWS Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC for low-latency viewing.

Description: Sends AI inference and system-status telemetry from the Tria Vision AI-Kit 6490 to /IOTCONNECT.

Description: Deploy /IOTCONNECT telemetry and commands as an AWS IoT Greengrass nucleus-lite component on the FRDM i.MX93 board.

Description: Deploy /IOTCONNECT telemetry and commands as an AWS IoT Greengrass nucleus-lite component on the Raspberry Pi 5.

Description: Deploy /IOTCONNECT telemetry and commands as an AWS IoT Greengrass nucleus-lite component on the STM32MP135F Discovery Kit.

Description: Deploy /IOTCONNECT telemetry and commands as an AWS IoT Greengrass nucleus-lite component on the STM32MP157F Discovery Kit.

Description: Deploy /IOTCONNECT telemetry and commands as an AWS IoT Greengrass nucleus-lite component on the STM32MP215F Discovery Kit.

Description: Deploy /IOTCONNECT telemetry and commands as an AWS IoT Greengrass nucleus-lite component on the STM32MP257F Discovery Kit.

Name: STM32MP257F-EV1 — Greengrass nucleus lite
Description: Deploy /IOTCONNECT telemetry and commands as an AWS IoT Greengrass nucleus-lite component on the STM32MP257F Evaluation Board.

Name: Arduino UNO Q — Python Lite SDK
Description: Get started with the /IOTCONNECT Python Lite SDK on the Arduino UNO Q: stream telemetry, receive cloud commands and run OTA updates from a Python app.

Name: PIC64GX Curiosity — Python Lite SDK
Description: Get started with the /IOTCONNECT Python Lite SDK on the Microchip PIC64GX Curiosity Kit: stream telemetry, receive cloud commands and run OTA updates from a Python app.

Name: S32G GoldBox — Python Lite SDK
Description: Get started with the /IOTCONNECT Python Lite SDK on the NXP S32G GoldBox: stream telemetry, receive cloud commands and run OTA updates from a Python app.

Name: MaaXBoard 8M — Python Lite SDK
